title: Dungeons Mushrooms
description: Makes red mushrooms look like the ones in Minecraft Dungeons.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

In the Soggy Swamp from Minecraft Dungeons, a few different sizes of red mushrooms can be found, and this resource pack adds 3 of the ones that best fit into Java.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc33681d94010ef6f4eceea34de40a4d08cbac9f_0.webp)

![Minecraft Dungeons In-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3eba6560c093d4a558ed9049e583b0656ed7e57b.png)
